communication: Maintain clear and structured communication during interviews.
Avoid one-word answers and explain concepts using practical examples.
Use professional and confident language while answering questions.
Speak at a moderate pace and avoid rushing through responses.
star_method: Use the STAR method while answering behavioral interview questions.
STAR stands for Situation, Task, Action, and Result.
Structure your answers logically for better clarity and professionalism.
Focus on measurable outcomes while explaining achievements.
body_language: Maintain eye contact during interviews to demonstrate confidence.
Sit upright and avoid nervous body movements.
Use positive facial expressions and professional posture.
Avoid crossing arms as it may appear defensive.
professionalism: Dress professionally according to company culture.
Be punctual and respectful throughout the interview process.
Research the company and job role before attending interviews.
Show enthusiasm and interest while discussing projects and experiences.
confidence: Practice answering common interview questions regularly.
Focus on strengths and accomplishments while communicating.
Prepare project explanations thoroughly before interviews.
Stay calm and composed when facing difficult questions.
